Minor'S Compromise In Scd.
Off Calendar Jun-05-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Two Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: F. Butler.
Lauren Gelber, Esq. for Petitioner: valeriano Pereyra, present as Guardian ad litem for: Arderick Liquigan and Arju Liquigan, minor Claimants, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, each Petition is granted and each compromise is approved.
Each, Attorney's Fees $4,867.98
Each, net balance of $14,603.93 to be deposited into a blocked account with Bank of America, 500 battery St., San Francisco, CA. 94111, no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Orders Approving Compromise of Claim and Orders to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
